asymmetry: A nursing student doing unpaid placement work for the NHS is left with £27 to last two weeks because Wales scrapped the £1,500 bursary that would have covered her costs.
hook: She's training to save your life. She has £27.
core_fact: Nursing students in Wales receive £0 placement bursary — down from £1,500 — while being forced to pay £7/day just to park at the hospital where they work for free.
villain: Welsh Government / NHS Wales placement funding policy
share_trigger: Did you see this? They're making student nurses work for free AND charge them to park while doing it.
search_query: NHS nursing student placement unpaid bursary cut Wales UK 2024 2025
